name: Stalingrad | Shark In The Sky!
description:
I'm sure this is something low effort. A sort of power fantasy.

A modern Russian Air Force pilot flying a Ka-50 Black Shark attack helicopter is ripped from the 21st century and dropped into the frozen ruins of Stalingrad, September 1942. Infinite ammunition and fuel, coaxial rotors, guided missiles, and a 30mm cannon that shreds 1940s armor and aircraft like tissue. You are an outside-context nightmare: Luftwaffe pilots panic, Panzer columns evaporate, Soviet troops stare in stunned disbelief. But the Shark is still mortal—one lucky 88mm shell, a sustained burst from a Bf 109, or a single bad maneuver and you're a smoking crater in the snow. Fragile power fantasy amid the blood and mud of the Eastern Front's deadliest battle. No heroes, no destiny—just survival and carnage.

creator: a madman
